questionHtml: Suggest one material that could be loaded into the biogas fermenter from which biogas can be produced.
markschemeHtml:
blackwater
OR
brownwater/sewage
OR
feces
OR
organic solid waste
OR
paper pulp
OR
other biodegradable material ✔

Do not accept methane and CO2.
